title: Remove Thumbs Up/Down Feedback Popups from ERD and Sign-Up
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the thumbs up/down feedback popups removed from the ERD footer and the sign-up flow, so that the interface is cleaner now that Pendo handles in-app feedback.
description:
With the adoption of Pendo for in-app analytics and feedback collection, the custom thumbs up/thumbs down feedback popups are no longer needed.

## Scope
- **Remove**: Footer feedback popup on the ERD page
- **Remove**: Feedback popup shown during first sign-up
- **Keep**: Feedback widget on the Metrics Analyst page (to be removed later)
acceptance_criteria: Thumbs up/down feedback popup is removed from the ERD page footer
Thumbs up/down feedback popup is removed from the first sign-up flow
Feedback widget on Metrics Analyst page remains unchanged
No broken references or orphaned code from the removal
ux_changes: Removed thumbs up/down feedback popups from the ERD footer and sign-up flow. Feedback now handled by Pendo.
middleware_changes: Removed server-side feedback collection logic and any associated routes for the removed popups.
implementation_notes: Pendo now handles user feedback collection. Custom feedback widgets removed from ERD and sign-up. Metrics Analyst feedback widget kept for now.
comment_summary: Developer implemented on the development branch.
